name: Feature Engineering (stores, drift, leakage, encoding)
description: 特征工程:特征库、漂移、泄漏与编码

detector.inline: profile.code_domains.some(d=>['feature_engineering','feature_store','feature_drift','online_features'].includes(d)) || profile.repo_signals.some(s=>/\b(feature store|train.?serve skew|temporal leakage|target leakage|feature drift|feature engineering|feast|tecton|one.?hot encoding|feature selection)\b/i.test(s)) ? 0.9 : 0
